essence: Clinging to fear and sorrow is not strength; it is tamasic inertia.
snippet: The dull-minded one does not let go of sleep, fear, grief, sorrow, and pride. That steadfastness is tamasic, Arjuna.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Pleasure that dulls you is not relief; it is confusion in disguise.
snippet: That pleasure, born of sleep, laziness, and negligence, deludes the self at the beginning and at the end; it is called tamasic.

speaker: Krishna
essence: No state is free from the three qualities of nature.
snippet: There is nothing on earth, in heaven, or among the radiant beings that is free from the three qualities born of nature.

essence: Your rightful work comes from your nature, not imitation.
snippet: O scorcher of foes, the duties of priests, warriors, merchants, and workers are divided according to the qualities born of their nature.

speaker: Krishna

speaker: Krishna

speaker: Krishna

speaker: Krishna
essence: Freedom grows from deliberate simplicity and steady restraint.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Peace begins when the sense of ownership ends.

speaker: Krishna

speaker: Krishna
essence: Devoted love turns understanding into immediate nearness.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Continuous action and complete refuge can lead to the same unchanging state.
snippet: A devotee who takes refuge in me, while always doing all actions, attains the eternal, imperishable state through my grace.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Hand over the action, and let the mind stay gathered there.
snippet: With your mind, surrender all actions to Me. Take refuge in the discipline of clear understanding and remain constantly focused on Me.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Grace opens the way; ego closes it.
snippet: Centered in me, you will cross all obstacles through my grace. But if you do not listen because of ego, you will fall.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Ego cannot veto what your nature has already chosen.
snippet: Relying on ego, you think, 'I will not fight.' That resolve is false; your nature will drive you into battle.

essence: Resistance cannot cancel what your nature is already set to do.
snippet: Bound by your own nature-born duty, you will do what you do not want to do in confusion. Even against your will, you will act.

speaker: Krishna

speaker: Krishna
essence: Wholehearted surrender opens the door to lasting peace.
snippet: Surrender to the divine with your whole being, Arjuna. By that grace, you will reach supreme peace and the eternal abode.

speaker: Krishna
essence: True guidance ends by returning choice to you.
snippet: Thus I have explained to you the most secret wisdom. Reflect on it fully, and then do as you wish.

speaker: Krishna
essence: The deepest teaching is spoken as care, not command.
snippet: Listen again to My most secret word. You are dear to Me, so I will speak for your good.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Wholehearted devotion becomes the shortest path home.
snippet: Fix your mind on me, become my devotee, worship me, and bow to me. You will come to me; I promise you this truly, because you are dear to…

speaker: Krishna
essence: Total refuge ends the burden of fear.
snippet: Abandon all duties and take refuge in Me alone. I will free you from all wrongdoing; do not grieve.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Deep truth must be shared only with those ready to receive it.
snippet: Never speak this to one without discipline, one without devotion, one unwilling to listen, or one who finds fault with me.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Devotion deepens when sacred truth is passed on.
snippet: Whoever shares this supreme secret among my devotees, with devoted love for me, will surely come to me without doubt.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Sharing this teaching becomes the highest form of devotion.
snippet: Among all human beings, no one does what is more dear to me than he does. On this earth, no one will ever be dearer than he is.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Sincere study of this dialogue becomes worship itself.
snippet: Whoever studies this sacred dialogue of ours will also worship me through the sacrifice of knowledge; that is my view.

speaker: Krishna
essence: Trustful listening can open the door to freedom.
snippet: Even a person who listens to this with trust and without fault-finding becomes free and reaches the auspicious realms earned by noble act…

speaker: Krishna
essence: True listening should end confusion, not just collect words.
snippet: O Partha, have you heard this with one-pointed mind? O Dhananjaya, has the delusion born of ignorance been destroyed in you?

speaker: Arjuna
essence: Grace ends confusion and turns insight into obedience.
snippet: Arjuna said: By your grace, O Achyuta, my delusion is destroyed and memory restored. I stand free of doubt and will do what you say.

speaker: Sanjaya
essence: A true dialogue can leave the listener shaken and changed.
snippet: Sanjaya said: Thus I heard this wondrous, hair-raising dialogue between Vasudeva and the great-souled Partha.

speaker: Sanjaya
essence: The deepest teaching is received, not invented.
snippet: By Vyasa's grace, I heard this supreme secret yoga directly from Krishna, the Lord of yoga, as he spoke it himself.

speaker: Sanjaya
essence: A sacred conversation keeps giving joy each time it is remembered.
snippet: O King, remembering again and again this wondrous, holy dialogue between Krishna and Arjuna, I rejoice again and again.

speaker: Sanjaya
essence: Remembering Krishna's vast form still overwhelms the mind with wonder.
snippet: Remembering that astonishing form of Krishna again and again, I feel great wonder, O King, and I rejoice again and again.

speaker: Sanjaya
essence: Right action carries its own victory.
